segments.label: manual-comping-pain
segments.caption: If you are still comping deals across ten Zillow tabs and a spreadsheet, you are losing the deal before you even open the calculator.

segments.label: ai-deal-scoring
segments.caption: Most listings in your market are not worth underwriting. AI scoring kills the weak ones in seconds so your time goes to the deals with real spread.

segments.label: instant-deal-alerts
segments.caption: The cleanest deal in your market should not depend on you refreshing a search at the right minute. Set your buy box and let the alerts find you.

segments.label: market-expansion
segments.caption: Pulling spread on a new city used to take a weekend. Search any ZIP, see scored deals on day one, and expand into a new market without hiring an analyst.
